original: Utilizing the latest in wireless energy transmission devices, the shield vampire system effectively leaches enemy defense screens in order to fortify the user’s own shields.\n\n(1x per fight)
You can’t use this module on something without shields!
For some reason, "+{var0}.getCombatName()+" tries to leach shields that no longer exist. What a waste!
